prose:
**Pyridine frontier-orbital result** — Computed with DFT, tier `standard` using **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** in **PySCF**, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz` with 11 atoms; this was a frontier-orbitals single-point calculation, not a geometry optimization.

Headline result: **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.1398131 eV**.

Additional orbital energies from the tool: HOMO = -7.2525992 eV; LUMO = -1.112786 eV. SCF converged: true, in 10 cycles. Total electronic energy = -6758.7152 eV = -248.3782 hartree.

Warnings: no warnings were reported by the tool result.

Engine integrity verdict: `trustworthy: true`.

Reproducibility: chemkit reported this invocation: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --solvent gas /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp1qozurcx/live.json`. The result did not include a live `.out` log path, so I cannot truthfully report one.
